get.description:
Shallow liveness check — does not call dependencies.

Returns app status, version, and build metadata.
Use this for load balancer health checks and container liveness probes.

Readiness check — verifies critical dependencies are reachable.

Tests database connectivity and reports dependency health.
Returns status 'ok' only when all dependencies are healthy.
Use this for container readiness probes and operational diagnostics.

Return the currently authenticated user's context.

Requires a valid Bearer token.  The response contains normalised
roles and groups derived from the IdP token claims.  Used by the
frontend to establish auth state at startup.

Public (unauthenticated) endpoint that exposes non-sensitive frontend
auth configuration.

Only public client metadata is returned — no secrets, keys, or tokens.
List all contacts. Requires admin role.

schema.title: Response List Contacts Api Contacts Get

post.description: Create a new contact. Requires admin role.

put.description: Update an existing contact. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Delete a contact. Requires admin role.

post.description: Delete multiple contacts in a single request. Requires admin role.
Update status for multiple contacts. Requires admin role.

get.description: Find duplicate contacts grouped by email, phone, and name+company. Requires admin role.

schema.title: Response List Tags Api Tags Get

post.description: Create a new tag. Duplicate names (case-insensitive) return existing tag.

delete.description: Delete a tag (also removes all mappings).

put.description: Replace all tags for a contact with the provided list of tag IDs.

schema.title: Response List Templates Api Templates Get

post.description: Create a new template. Requires admin role.

put.description: Update an existing template. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Delete a template. Requires admin role.

schema.title: Response List Leads Api Leads Get

post.description: Create a new lead. Requires admin role.

get.description: Get a single lead by ID. Requires authentication.

put.description: Update a lead. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Delete a lead. Requires admin role.

patch.description: Patch a lead's stage. Requires admin role. Used by Kanban drag-and-drop.

schema.title: Response List Activities Api Activities Get

post.description: Create a new activity. Requires admin role.

get.description: Get a single activity by ID. Requires authentication.

put.description: Update an activity. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Delete an activity. Requires admin role.

get.description: Return the current application settings. Requires authentication.

put.description:
Update application settings. Requires admin role.

The incoming payload is merged into the existing settings record.

get.description:
Return lead conversion funnel analytics.

The funnel shows how leads flow through each stage, with conversion
rates, drop-off counts, and average time spent per stage.

List recent audit events. Requires admin role.

Optionally filter by entity type and limit the number of results.

schema.title: Response Get Audit Log Api Audit Get
